### ResizeObserver\_2

监听子组件的尺寸变化

```typescript
ResizeObserver: React.ForwardRefExoticComponent<{
    onResize?: (size: SizeInfo) => void;
    children: React.ReactElement;
} & React.RefAttributes<unknown>>
```
